setup.title: Group Reservation
setup.selectGender: Please select your gender to continue
setup.noBottlesFound: No bottles found with the applied filters
setup.selectMixerRequired: Please select a mixer for each bottle to continue

summary.title: Order Summary
summary.fillDetails: Fill in your details to see the summary

guests.title: Guest Details
guests.youWillPay: You will pay for {{count}} of {{total}} people
guests.minGuestsRequired: You must pay for at least {{count}} people (including yourself)
guests.completeAllDetails: Please complete the details for all guests
guests.organizerNote: You'll receive your entry upon meeting the minimum payment
guests.guestPaidNote: This guest only needs to fill in their details to receive their entry
guests.guestPaymentNote: You'll receive a link to share with this guest to pay their entry ({{price}})
guests.infoMessage: Your reservation will be sent to staff for approval. Once approved, you'll receive a link to share with all guests so they can fill in their details or pay and receive their entry.

confirmation.title: Reservation Received!
confirmation.description: Your group reservation has been submitted and is pending approval from our team.
confirmation.reviewMessage: Your request is being reviewed by our team. Once approved, you'll receive an email with your ticket and the shareable link for your guests.

timeline.reviewDesc: Our team is verifying your request
timeline.sentDesc: You'll receive your ticket and the guest link via email

confirmation.saveCode: Save this code to manage your reservation or contact support.

infoList.reviewTime: Staff will review your request shortly (usually within 24 hours)
infoList.emailNotice: Once approved, you'll receive your ticket and the shareable link via email
infoList.paidGuests: Guests you paid for will need to fill in their details using the link to receive their tickets
infoList.unpaidGuests: Guests you didn't pay for will need to complete payment and fill in their details using the link
infoList.updates: You'll receive email updates about your reservation status

successBanner.paymentComplete: Payment complete! Your ticket has been sent to your email.
successBanner.dataComplete: Info complete! Your ticket has been sent to your email.

statusBanner.pendingDesc: Your reservation is being reviewed. You'll receive an email when approved.
statusBanner.approvedDesc: Guests can complete their details and receive their tickets.
statusBanner.rejectedDesc: Your reservation could not be approved. Contact the venue for more info.

success.title: Payment Complete!
success.description: Your payment has been successfully processed. Once staff approves the group reservation, you'll receive your ticket via email.
success.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find your payment information
success.approvalDesc: The group reservation is being reviewed by staff. When approved:

timeline.sentDesc: You'll receive your ticket via email

nextSteps.review: Staff will review the group reservation
nextSteps.email: You'll receive an email with your ticket when approved
nextSteps.hostTickets: The host will receive tickets for all paid guests
nextSteps.saveTicket: Save your ticket on your phone for the event

cancel.title: Payment Canceled
cancel.description: Your payment was canceled. No charges were made to your account.

reasons.retry: You can try again when ready

guestComplete.title: Complete Your Info
guestComplete.ticketSent: Your ticket has been generated and sent to your email.
guestComplete.ticketAlreadySent: Your ticket was already sent to your email.
guestComplete.completeInfoDesc: Complete your payment to receive your ticket
guestComplete.completeAndPayDesc: Enter your information, then proceed to payment
guestComplete.completeDataDesc: Enter your information to receive your ticket
guestComplete.paySecurely: Pay securely with your credit or debit card.
guestComplete.accessCodeDesc: This ticket was paid for by the organizer. Enter the access code they shared with you to continue.
guestComplete.noCode: Don't have the code? Ask your group organizer for it.
guestComplete.name: Name

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.birthDateFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future
errors.minAge: You must be at least {{age}} years old

paybackMessages: Don't forget to pay back your friend! Good karma awaits.
Pro tip: Buy your host a drink at the party. It's only fair!
Remember: the host covered you. Time to settle up!
Your ticket is ready! Now go pay back your generous friend.
Free ticket? Not quite - your host is waiting for that payback!
